directive: Focus: (1) AutoGen 0.4 agent pool patterns - how it manages persistent workers. (2) LangGraph multi-agent with persistent state. (3) OpenAI Assistants API threads as persistent conversation model. (4) Any Python lib implementing elastic LLM agent pools. Report concrete code patterns, not just names.

Focus: (1) Bedrock Converse API multi-turn - confirm message history is caller-managed (stateless API). (2) Bedrock Sessions API - does it persist conversation server-side? (3) Anthropic prompt caching for system prompt + established truths. (4) Context window: 200k tokens, when to summarize. Report API shapes.

Focus: (1) asyncio.Queue + worker coroutine pattern for elastic pool. (2) Scale-up trigger: queue.qsize() > threshold. (3) Scale-down: idle timeout per worker. (4) macOS process count check: pgrep -c kiro-cli. (5) Backpressure: asyncio.Semaphore or bounded queue. Report working code skeleton.

Focus: (1) Bedrock Sessions API docs - does it store conversation history server-side? URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/sessions.html. (2) MCP Python SDK - how to run MCP server and call tools from Python client. (3) boto3 bedrock-runtime converse() - confirm messages param is full history each call. Report exact API shapes.

Focus: (1) Check current debate system codebase at /Users/murivirg/work/github/truth-seeking-debate for existing agent/queue patterns. (2) Find how kiro-cli is currently invoked (subprocess? stdin?).
